column1: #   File_id    — groups rows into one operation (same id = same output)
#                Multi-file intersection: same id, different Filename
#                Multi-filter on same file: same id+Filename, different Step
#   PDF_*      — PDF report settings (only on first row of each group)
#   Step       — filter/sort execution order within a group
#   Column     — column name from the source file
#   Value      — comparison value (for between: lower bound)

column2: OR (how filters combine within a source file)

column1: # File_id 101  Generation=TRUE   PVB breakout + Stage 2 intersection
# File_id 103  Generation=FALSE  Minervini near-miss (7 of 8 criteria)
# File_id 105  Generation=FALSE  PVB ∩ Minervini — highest conviction
# File_id 201  Generation=TRUE   NASDAQ100 Electronic Technology sector
# File_id 301  Generation=TRUE   QQQ IBD daily RS/PER report
# File_id 302  Generation=FALSE  SPY IBD daily RS/PER report
# File_id 401  Generation=TRUE   SP500 top performers evolution
# File_id 402  Generation=FALSE  Semiconductor top performers evolution
# Finds tickers that appear in ALL listed sources simultaneously.
# Tickers with a PVB signal AND currently in Stage 2 (Advancing)
# 103: Minervini near-miss — 7 or more criteria pass (watch list)
# 105: PVB + Minervini intersection — highest conviction breakouts
# Stock has a PVB volume breakout signal AND passes all Minervini criteria
# Volume breakout, in uptrend stage, with strong relative strength
# Filters basic_calc or stage_analysis by sector/universe/condition.
# 202: SP500 momentum leaders — strong year + month performance
# 203: Large-cap growth — $10B+ market cap with strong year performance
# Generates charts and PDF analysis from RS and percentile data.
# template_routing_options: glob pattern to select specific RS/PER files.
# 301: QQQ IBD daily — RS and percentile report for all stocks vs QQQ
# 302: SPY IBD daily — RS and percentile report for all stocks vs SPY
# 401: SP500 top performers across all timeframes
